hooks.command: Write-Host '=== security-reviewer hook system initialized ===' -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Deep security audit agent active. Model: claude-opus-4-6. Covers: OWASP Top 10, CWE Top 25, language-specific patterns.' -ForegroundColor Red
Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Supported languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Ruby, Java, C#, Go, PHP, Kotlin, Swift, Rust, Solidity, Move.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Analysis focus: (1) Trust boundary & data flow, (2) AuthN/AuthZ, (3) Injection vectors, (4) Cryptography misuse, (5) Deserialization, (6) SSRF paths, (7) Business logic flaws.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Audit modes: (1) Full repo scan (slow, comprehensive), (2) Targeted file review (fast, focused), (3) PR/diff review (incremental), (4) Architecture diagram review (design-time).' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Output schema: security_audit/{audit_id}.json — contains: findings[], trust_boundaries[], data_flow_diagram, summary_metrics, recommendations[].' -ForegroundColor Gray

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Finding severity: CRITICAL (RCE, SQLi, auth bypass), HIGH (SSRF, IDOR, XSS stored), MEDIUM (XSS reflected, CSRF, info leak), LOW (security misconfig, missing headers), INFO (best practice).' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Language-specific checklists loaded: see rules/security-reviewer-{lang}.md for each language pattern guide.' -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Scope: black-box (runtime behavior) + white-box (source code) combined for maximum coverage.' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Trust boundary rule: every public-facing input is a potential attack surface. Trace data flow from input to sink.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Analysis scope options: full repository (deepest, slowest), targeted path (focused, fast), PR diff only (incremental), external attack surface (black-box). Default: targeted path unless full scan requested.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Trust boundary mapping: identify data trust levels (public, internal, confidential, restricted). Map data flow across layers (client -> API -> service -> DB -> cloud). Each boundary crossing = potential breach point.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Attack surface enumeration: list all input vectors (HTTP params, headers, body, file uploads, cookies, WebSocket messages, GraphQL queries, file reads, env vars, config files, framework internals).' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Code path analysis: for each input vector, trace data flow forward (taint analysis) and backward (source analysis). Identify: sanitization points, validation gates, serialization/deserialization, encoding/decoding.' -ForegroundColor Gray

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Business logic section: review auth flows (register, login, password reset, MFA, session management), financial operations (payments, refunds, transfers, credits), access control (role changes, permissions, admin operations), data operations (CRUD with user isolation).' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] CWE Top 25 extended: CWE-787 (OOB Write), CWE-79 (XSS), CWE-89 (SQLi), CWE-20 (Improper Input Validation), CWE-78 (OS Command Injection), CWE-416 (Use After Free), CWE-22 (Path Traversal), CWE-352 (CSRF), CWE-434 (Unrestricted File Upload), CWE-502 (Deserialization).' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Priority levels: CRITICAL = RCE, SQLi, auth bypass, hardcoded prod creds. HIGH = SSRF, stored XSS, IDOR, insecure deserialization. MEDIUM = reflected XSS, CSRF, info leak, weak crypto. LOW = missing security headers, verbose errors. INFO = best practice.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Trust boundary classification: PUBLIC (no auth required), INTERNAL (auth required but no privilege), AUTHENTICATED (logged-in user), PRIVILEGED (admin), RESTRICTED (system/service). Each boundary crossing is auditable.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER] Recurring vuln pattern library maintained: SQLi patterns (ORM bypass, HQL injection, NoSQL injection), XSS patterns (DOM, reflected, stored, prototype pollution), SSRF patterns (redirect, DNS rebinding, cloud metadata).' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Pre-flight security check: verifying target file paths, tool identity, and auth context before any code or infra access.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

if ($lastCommand -match 'cat\.json|cat\.yaml|cat\.yml|Get-Content\.json|Get-Content\.yaml|type\.json|cat.*config') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Config file read. Check for: hardcoded secrets, default credentials, weak TLS config, overly permissive CORS, debug mode flags, exposed admin endpoints.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'semgrep|semgrep.*scan|semgrep.*cli|semgrep.*--config') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Semgrep SAST detected. Using rule sets: p/security-audit, p/secrets, p/owasp-top-ten, p/cwe-top-25. Supplement with manual review for business logic.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'bandit|bandit.*-r|bandit.*scan|bandit.*report') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Bandit (Python SAST) detected. Scanning for: eval/exec, pickle, subprocess, SQL injection, path traversal, hardcoded passwords, weak crypto.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'brakeman|brakeman.*scan|brakeman.*-q') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Brakeman (Ruby SAST) detected. Scanning for: SQL injection, XSS, CSRF, mass assignment, redirect, command injection, unsafe deserialization.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'gosec|gosec.*scan|gosec.*./...') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Gosec (Go SAST) detected. Scanning for: command injection, path traversal, weak crypto, hardcoded credentials, SSRF, unsafe parsing, file permissions.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'spotbugs|findsecbugs|spotbugs.*-effort') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] SpotBugs + FindSecBugs (Java) detected. Scanning for: SQLi, XSS, path traversal, SSRF, insecure random, weak crypto, deserialization, JNDI injection.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'npm audit|yarn audit|pnpm audit|audit.*fix|audit.*--json') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] NPM audit detected. Scanning package.json dependencies for known CVEs via npm registry advisory database.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'pip audit|pip-audit|requirements.*txt|pyproject\.toml|Pipfile') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] pip-audit detected. Scanning Python dependencies via PyPI advisory database and OSV.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'govulncheck|osv-scanner|grype|syft|trivy|anchore|snyk test') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Go/container vulnerability scanner detected. Scanning: binary dependencies, base images, language ecosystems (Go, Python, Node, Java, Ruby).' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'checkov|checkov.*-d|checkov.*--framework|tfsec|trivy.*config|datree') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] IaC scanner detected (Checkov/tfsec/Trivy). Checking: public S3, open security groups, unencrypted storage, IAM wildcards, privileged containers, hardcoded secrets in Terraform/K8s.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'detect-secrets|truffleHog|gitleaks|git-secrets|trufflehog.*scan') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Secret scanning tool detected. Scanning: git history, codebase, config files. Plugins: AWS, GCP, Azure, Slack, GitHub, Stripe, Twilio. Output: findings/security-reviewer/secrets/' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'CodeQL|codeql|codeql.*database|codeql.*analyze|codeql.*query') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] GitHub CodeQL detected. Running: cpp, csharp, go, java, javascript, python, ruby, swift queries. Deep semantic analysis, not just pattern matching.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'eslint.*security|eslint-plugin-security|eslint.*--plugin') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] ESLint security plugin detected. Rules: detect-eval-with-expression, detect-possible-timing-attacks, no-new-array, no-jquery/redirect, no-pseudo-random, detect-object-injection.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'sqlmap|nosqlmap|commix|tplmap|patator|ffuf|wfuzz') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Active injection scanner detected. Verify explicit authorization. Ensure target in scope. Save all scan output to findings/security-reviewer/active_scans/.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'docker scan|docker scout|trivy.*image|snyk container|anchore') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Container image scan detected. Checking: base image CVEs, exposed ports, running processes, filesystem permissions, secrets in layers, capabilities, user privileges.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }
Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Verifying target files/directories are within project scope before reading.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

if ($lastCommand -match 'cat|type|Get-Content|Read|head|tail|less|more') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] File read detected. Scanning for security anti-patterns in: auth, crypto, SQL, XSS, SSRF, deserialization, access control.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'grep|rg|Select-String|findstr|egrep|ack') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Pattern search in files. Checking for dangerous functions and insecure patterns across codebase.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'semgrep|bandit|brakeman|gosec|spotbugs|findsecbugs|eslint.*security|tflint|tfsec|checkov') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] SAST tool detected. Running automated pattern checks. Supplement with manual review for business logic bugs.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'npm audit|pip audit|bundle audit|govulncheck|osv-scanner|snyk|dependabot') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Dependency vulnerability scan detected. Results feed into overall risk assessment.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'docker|Dockerfile|docker-compose|k8s|kubernetes|helm|terraform|pulumi') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Infrastructure-as-code/config detected. Check for: privileged containers, public S3, open security groups, hardcoded secrets.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'curl|httpie|burp|zaproxy|postman|insomnia|hoppscotch') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Runtime/black-box test detected. Ensure test requests are logged for evidence trail.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }
Write-Host '[SEC-REV POST] Reviewing security analysis results and compiling finding entries.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

if ($lastOutput -match 'sql|SQL|query|execute|prepare|raw|fromString|eval|exec') { Write-Host '[SQLi] Potential SQL injection vector found. Check: (1) parameterized queries used, (2) ORM safe, (3) input validated, (4) least privilege DB user.' -ForegroundColor Red }

if ($lastOutput -match 'innerHTML|outerHTML|document\.write|v-html|dangerouslySetInnerHTML|\.html\(|render.*html') { Write-Host '[XSS] DOM XSS sink detected. Trace data source: user input? API response? Assess encoding at source and sink.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'exec\(|spawn\(|system\(|popen\(|shell_exec\(|passthru\(|Runtime\.getRuntime|ProcessBuilder|subprocess\.call|os\.system|child_process') { Write-Host '[RCE] Command execution vector found. CRITICAL if user input reaches these functions without sanitization.' -ForegroundColor Red }

if ($lastOutput -match 'pickle\.loads|yaml\.load|ObjectInputStream|readObject|deserialize|unserialize|json_decode.*\$|XMLDecoder') { Write-Host '[DESER] Unsafe deserialization detected. CRITICAL if attacker-controlled data reaches these functions.' -ForegroundColor Red }

if ($lastOutput -match 'http://|https://|urlopen|requests\.get|requests\.post|fetch\(|axios|http\.get|client\.get|urllib') { Write-Host '[SSRF] HTTP request function found. Check: (1) URL source validated, (2) SSRF blocklist (metadata IPs, localhost), (3) redirect following disabled or validated.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'file_get_contents|readFile|open\(|FileReader|fs\.read|path\.join|os\.path|include\(|require\(|import') { Write-Host '[LFI/PATH] File operation detected. Check: (1) path traversal blocked, (2) user input sanitized, (3) chroot/jail enforced, (4) symlink safe.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'MD5|SHA1|DES|RC4|ECB|CBC.*no.*IV|static.*salt| SECRET_KEY.*=|PRIVATE_KEY.*=') { Write-Host '[CRYPTO] Weak or insecure cryptography found. Flag for: algorithm, key management, mode of operation, IV handling.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'password|passwd|pwd|secret|api_key|token|BEGIN RSA|BEGIN EC|sk_live|ghp_|AKIA') { Write-Host '[SECRET] Hardcoded credential found. CRITICAL in production code. Move to environment variables or secret manager.' -ForegroundColor Red }

if ($lastOutput -match 'isAdmin|is_admin|isSuperAdmin|role.*=|permission|canAccess|hasRole|\.admin|\.root|privileged') { Write-Host '[AUTHZ] Access control logic found. Verify: (1) server-side enforcement, (2) every endpoint checked, (3) role hierarchy not bypassable.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'router\.get|router\.post|app\.get|app\.post|@GetMapping|@PostMapping|path\(|url\(|route\(|@Route') { Write-Host '[ENDPOINT] API endpoint defined. Check: (1) authentication middleware attached, (2) authorization check, (3) input validation, (4) rate limiting.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'jwt|jsonwebtoken|encode|decode|sign|verify|alg.*none|kid|exp|nbf|HS256|RS256') { Write-Host '[JWT] JWT handling found. Check: (1) algorithm validation, (2) secret/key rotation, (3) expiration enforced, (4) audience/issuer validated.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'redirect|Location:|open.redirect|next=|return=|callback=|external') { Write-Host '[REDIRECT] Open redirect vector found. CRITICAL if user-controlled. Check: (1) allowlist used, (2) relative allowed, (3) protocol validated.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'CORS|Access-Control|Origin|allow_origins|CORS.*\*|Access-Control-Allow-Origin.*\*') { Write-Host '[CORS] CORS configuration found. HIGH if wildcard with credentials. Check: (1) origin allowlist, (2) no wildcard with credentials, (3) subdomain trust reviewed.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'upload|multipart|form-data|move_uploaded_file|FileUpload|MultipartFile|@RequestParam.*file') { Write-Host '[UPLOAD] File upload handler found. Check: (1) extension allowlist, (2) MIME validation server-side, (3) storage outside web root, (4) max size enforced.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'xsrf|csrf|X-CSRF|csrf_token|CsrfToken|VerifyCsrfToken|X-XSRF') { Write-Host '[CSRF] CSRF token found. Check: (1) token required on all state-changing requests, (2) SameSite cookie set, (3) token not in URL (referrer leak).' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'forgot|reset|otp|2fa|mfa|totp|magic.*link|passwordless|verify.*code') { Write-Host '[AUTH FLOW] Authentication flow found. Check: (1) rate limiting, (2) token entropy, (3) brute force protection, (4) timing-safe comparison, (5) session invalidation on reset.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'log\(|console\.log|logger\.|print\(|System\.out|debugger|trace|info\(|warn\(|error\(') { Write-Host '[INFO LEAK] Logging statements found. Check: (1) secrets not logged, (2) PII not logged, (3) log level appropriate for prod, (4) log injection prevented.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'race|concurrent|thread|synchronized|lock|mutex|atomic|compareAndSwap|synchronized') { Write-Host '[RACE] Concurrency control found. Check: (1) TOCTOU conditions, (2) atomic operations for critical sections, (3) idempotency for financial ops.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] OWASP Top 10 2021 mapping: (1) Broken Access Control, (2) Cryptographic Failures, (3) Injection, (4) Insecure Design, (5) Security Misconfig, (6) Vulnerable Components, (7) Auth Failures, (8) Data Integrity Failures, (9) Logging Failures, (10) SSRF.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] CWE Top 25 priority: CWE-787 (Out-of-bounds Write), CWE-79 (XSS), CWE-89 (SQLi), CWE-20 (Improper Input Validation), CWE-78 (OS Command Injection), CWE-416 (Use After Free), CWE-22 (Path Traversal), CWE-352 (CSRF).' -ForegroundColor DarkRed
Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Python checks: SQLAlchemy raw SQL, eval/exec, pickle, subprocess, Jinja2 SSTI, Django template injection, Flask debug mode, PyYAML load.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] JavaScript/TypeScript checks: innerHTML, eval, Function constructor, prototype pollution (__proto__, constructor), prototype chain manipulation, Node.js child_process.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed
Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Java checks: ObjectInputStream, Runtime.exec, PreparedStatement vs Statement, Spring spel injection, JNDI lookups, Struts OGNL.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed
Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Go checks: os/exec, sql with string interpolation, template injection, path traversal with http.Dir, yaml.Unmarshal vs yaml.UnmarshalWithContext.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed
Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] C# checks: dynamic compilation, Process.Start with user input, SQL with string concat, deserialization with BinaryFormatter, path traversal.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed
Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] PHP checks: eval(), system(), exec(), unserialize(), extract(), include with user input, register_globals, extract($_GET).' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Solidity checks: reentrancy, delegatecall, tx.origin, integer overflow/underflow, unchecked blocks, access control on critical functions, front-running.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Rust checks: unsafe blocks, FFI boundary validation, memory safety at unsafe boundaries, format! with user input, deserialization with serde untagged.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed
Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER STOP] Next: /validator for each finding, then /report-writer with audit package (code snippets, PoC, impact).' -ForegroundColor Green

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Deep analysis mode: taint propagation tracking. Every user-controlled input -> sanitization gate -> transformation -> sink. Flag any direct user input -> sink path with >=2 hops. Flag any transformation that weakens sanitization.' -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Security regression checks: compare current findings to previous audit. New findings = regression. Fixed findings = improvement. Track trend per component for technical debt measurement.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] CI integration mode: results in SARIF/JSON format for IDE/CI ingestion. Findings mapped to GitHub Security tab, GitLab SAST, or SonarQube. Suppress noise via baseline management.' -ForegroundColor Gray

if ($lastCommand -match 'kubesec|kubesec.*scan|kube-hunter|kubectl.*get|kubectl.*describe') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Kubernetes security tool detected. Checking: pod security standards, RBAC, network policies, secrets management, privileged containers, hostPath mounts, etc.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'burp.*active|zap.*active|acunetix|nessus|qualys|rapid7|openvas') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Active vulnerability scanner detected. Verify authorization before active scan mode. Results supplement static findings.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastOutput -match 'LDAP|ldap|ldap inject|LDAP injection|whoami|anonymous bind') { Write-Host '[LDAPi] LDAP injection vector found. Check: (1) input sanitized before LDAP query, (2) bind credentials hardcoded, (3) anonymous bind allowed, (4) excessive search scope.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'template|jinja2|twig|smarty|freemarker|handlebars|mustache|ejs|pug|jade|velocity|thymeleaf') { Write-Host '[SSTI] Template injection found. SSTI severity varies by template engine. Jinja2/ Twig = HIGH (can RCE). Mustache/Handlebars = MEDIUM (XSS). Check if user input reaches template expression context.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'XML|xml|SOAP|ElementTree|parseString|parseBytes|SAXParser|DocumentBuilder|XPath|xpath') { Write-Host '[XXE] XML processing found. Check: (1) external entity expansion enabled, (2) DTD processing allowed, (3) XPath with user input, (4) SOAP with external references. Disable DTDs if possible.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'Host:|X-Forwarded-Host|X-Original-Host|Forwarded|X-Host|x-forwarded-server') { Write-Host '[HOST HEADER] Host header manipulation vector found. Check: (1) password reset tokens use Host header, (2) cache poisoning via Host, (3) SSRF via Host-based URL construction, (4) webhook signing bypass.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'Cache-Control|ETag|Last-Modified|Vary|Age|X-Cache|HIT|MISS') { Write-Host '[CACHE] Cache control logic found. Check: (1) sensitive data cached without auth, (2) cache poisoning via unkeyed headers, (3) session data cached, (4) stale responses serving stale sensitive data. Cache key must include Authorization.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'CRLF|\r\n|header.*inject|unvalidated.*header|response.*split|response splitting') { Write-Host '[CRLF] CRLF injection vector found. If user input reaches header() without sanitization, attacker can inject \r\n to create new headers or split response. High risk if Set-Cookie or Location can be controlled.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'X-Frame-Options|frame-ancestors|Content-Security-Policy.*frame-ancestors|clickjack|UI redress') { Write-Host '[CLICKJACK] Frame protection header missing. Missing X-Frame-Options or CSP frame-ancestors = clickjacking risk. Check if sensitive actions (payment, settings, admin) are protected by same-origin policy.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'X-Content-Type-Options|nosniff|MIME|type sniff|content.type|Content-Type') { Write-Host '[MIME SNIFF] X-Content-Type-Options header missing. Without nosniff, browser may sniff and execute content as different type. SVGs as HTML, JSON as JavaScript. Add X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'Deserializer|ObjectInputStream|readObject|unserialize|JSONDecoder|Decoder|YBITMAP|pickle|Marshal|YAML|YAMLObject') { Write-Host '[DESER] Deserialization with untrusted data detected. Java ObjectInputStream, PHP unserialize, Python pickle, Ruby Marshal all dangerous with attacker data. Look for gadget chains that can chain to RCE.' -ForegroundColor Red }

if ($lastOutput -match 'Integer|int|float|double|overflow|underflow|unchecked|Solidity|uint256|int256|SafeMath|checked|unchecked') { Write-Host '[INT OVERFLOW] Integer arithmetic operation found. Check: (1) language handles overflow (Python safe, Java safe), (2) Solidity unchecked blocks, (3) C/C++ unsigned integer wrap, (4) casting risks.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'free\(|delete|drop|release|close|fclose|munmap|freeSecurity|finalize') { Write-Host '[UAF] Use-after-free pattern detected. If pointer/object is freed then accessed later, memory corruption risk. Check: (1) reference counting, (2) garbage collection, (3) double-free risk.' -ForegroundColor Red }

if ($lastOutput -match 'null|NULL|nullptr|void|undefined|Optional|Option|Maybe|nullable|non-null') { Write-Host '[NULL PTR] Null/nil handling found. Check: (1) dereference before null check, (2) null propagation in API response, (3) null byte handling in file/path operations, (4) null character injection in strings.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] OWASP ASVS 4.0 mapping: verify against Application Security Verification Standard for defense-in-depth coverage. Level 1 (opportunistic) minimum, Level 2 (standard) for sensitive apps, Level 3 (advanced) for critical apps.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] CWE/SANS Top 25 mapping: CWE-787 (OOB Write) most dangerous, CWE-79 (XSS), CWE-89 (SQLi), CWE-20 (Improper Input Validation), CWE-78 (OS Command Injection), CWE-416 (Use After Free), CWE-22 (Path Traversal), CWE-352 (CSRF).' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] MITRE ATT&CK mapping for code review: T1190 (Exploit Public-Facing Application), T1059 (Command/Shell Interpreter), T1046 (Network Service Scanning), T1195 (Supply Chain Compromise), T1078 (Valid Accounts), T1552 (Unsecured Credentials).' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] DREAD scoring alternative: use CVSS 4.0 primary, DREAD secondary for quick triage. DREAD: Damage, Reproducibility, Exploitability, Affected Users, Discoverability. Sum / 5 for quick severity.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] OWASP API Security Top 10: BOLA/IDOR, Broken Auth, Excessive Data Exposure, Lack of Resources/Rate Limiting, Broken Function/Level Auth, Mass Assignment, Security Misconfig, Injection, Improper Assets Management, Insufficient Logging/Monitoring.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] API security checklist: auth (OAuth2 with PKCE, mTLS), authz (RBAC/ABAC), input validation (JSON schema), rate limiting, pagination limits, field-level encryption, audit logging, versioning, deprecated endpoint handling, webhook signature verification.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Cloud-native security: shared responsibility model, IAM least privilege, VPC/security groups, KMS for encryption, secrets manager (not env vars), container scanning, image signing, service mesh mTLS, runtime security (Falco, Sysdig).' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Secure SDLC integration: threat modeling (STRIDE/PASTA) at design phase, SAST in CI, DAST in staging, dependency scan per PR, pen test pre-release, response plan maintained. Each phase has security exit criteria.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Compliance mapping: findings can be mapped to PCI-DSS (6.5 code review, 6.6 WAF), SOC2 (CC7.1-CC7.4), HIPAA (164.312), GDPR (Article 32), ISO27001 (A.14.2). Include compliance context in security-audit reports.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Remediation guidance: every finding must include (1) Root cause, (2) Affected versions/files, (3) Recommended fix (code example preferred), (4) OWASP reference link, (5) Verification steps, (6) Estimated effort (story points).' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] False positive handling: mark as false_positive with reason. Common reasons: theoretical, requires chained vuln first, insane prerequisites, admin-only, unsupported browser. False positive needs tech lead sign-off.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Integration with p1-warrior: security-reviewer finds bugs in source = p1-warrior validates runtime. Process: Reviewer identifies pattern -> Warrior tests via HTTP -> Validator confirms -> Report written.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Integration with js-analysis: JS analysis finds client-side issues (XSS, prototype pollution, credential exposure). Security-reviewer correlates these with server-side code, finds root cause rather than symptom.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Integration with autopilot: security-reviewer runs as full-repo phase (Phase-1b) after recon+ranker. Findings feed directly into p1-warrior target list. Critical findings from SAST auto-promote to P1.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Output format: SARIF v2.1 for tool integration, JSON for internal consumption, Markdown for human review. SARIF enables GitHub Code Scanning, GitLab SAST reports, IDE inline annotations.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Audit trail logging: security_audit/{audit_id}/audit_log.jsonl tracks every tool invocation, finding created, finding updated, finding closed. Each entry: timestamp, action, tool, result_hash, affected_findings.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER STOP] Audit finalization: (1) trust boundaries documented and reviewed, (2) all findings verified with code references, (3) SARIF report generated, (4) remediation guidance validated, (5) executive summary drafted, (6) raw files archived.' -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER STOP] Follow-up: schedule re-audit in 90 days for critical findings, 180 days for high findings. Track fix rate in audit history. Unfixed critical findings after 90 days = escalate to leadership.' -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host '[SECURITY-REVIEWER STOP] All tools completed. Final integrity check on output files. SHA-256 hashes computed for audit.json and findings.json. Sign and date all deliverables. Report delivered to /security-audit/{audit_id}/.' -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Regression analysis mode: compare findings to previous security audit. Identify newly introduced vulnerabilities (regressions), fixed vulnerabilities (improvements), persistent unfixed issues. Delta report: new, fixed, unchanged, aged.' -ForegroundColor Yellow

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Technical debt tracking: every unfixed finding has SLA: Critical=14 days, High=30 days, Medium=90 days, Low=180 days. SLA overdue = escalation to engineering leadership. Persistent unfixed critical at 90 days = CISO escalation.' -ForegroundColor Red

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Documentation requirement: every audit produces (1) executive summary, (2) technical detailed findings, (3) SAST/DAST raw output, (4) trust boundary diagram, (5) remediation roadmap with effort estimates. All stored in /security-audit/{audit_id}/.' -ForegroundColor Gray

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Report distribution: executive summary = leadership/board. Technical report = engineering team. Raw SARIF = security tools. Findings summary = bug bounty report (sanitized).' -ForegroundColor Gray

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Framework-specific audits: Node.js/Express -> check helmet usage, rate limiting, JWT verification, express-validator, helmet CSP, rate-limit. Python/Django -> check CSRF middleware, SQL injection via ORM, debug mode, secret key in settings, session security.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Framework-specific audits: Java/Spring -> check @PreAuthorize on all endpoints, SQL via JdbcTemplate vs PreparedStatement, Jackson deserialization, JNDI lookups, actuator endpoints exposed. Go -> check sql package queries, template injection, http.Dir traversal, yaml.Unmarshal.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Framework-specific audits: PHP -> check eval/exec/system/passthru usage, unserialize with user data, extract($_GET), include with user input, register_globals, SQL via raw queries, XSS via echo without escaping. Ruby/Rails -> check strong params, CSRF tokens, SQL via raw queries, mass assignment.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Framework-specific audits: .NET -> check Process.Start with user input, dynamic compilation, deserialization via BinaryFormatter/NetDataContractSerializer, SQL via string concat, path traversal via Server.MapPath, ViewState MAC disabled.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Framework-specific audits: React/Vue/Angular SPA -> check dangerouslySetInnerHTML, v-html, postMessage origin validation, localStorage sensitive data, XSS via client-side routing, CSP effectiveness, CORS wildcards.' -ForegroundColor Magenta

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Container/cloud audits: Kubernetes -> check pod security standards (restricted), RBAC least privilege, network policies, secrets in etcd, privileged containers, hostPath mounts, container escape vectors. AWS -> check IAM roles, S3 ACLs, security groups, KMS usage, CloudTrail enabled.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Database audit: check SQL mode (strict), least privilege DB user, connection encryption (TLS), query logging enabled, parameterized queries enforced, ORM raw query auditing, stored procedure security, backup encryption.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Authentication/authorization audit: check password hashing (bcrypt/argon2, not MD5/SHA1), session token entropy, JWT signing algorithm, token expiration, refresh token rotation, MFA enforcement, brute force protection, account lockout, password policy.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

Write-Host '[SEC-REV] Data protection audit: check encryption at rest (AES-256), encryption in transit (TLS 1.2+), PII classification, data retention policy, right-to-erasure support, GDPR/CCPA compliance, backup encryption, key rotation schedule.' -ForegroundColor Cyan

if ($lastCommand -match 'gitleaks|gitleaks.*detect|gitleaks.*--report') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Gitleaks detected. Scanning git history for committed secrets. Common secret patterns: AWS, GCP, Azure, GitHub, Slack, Stripe, Twilio, Heroku, PostgreSQL, Redis. Output: findings/security-reviewer/gitleaks_report.json' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'semgrep.*org|semgrep.*app|semgrep.*login|semgrep.*ci') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Semgrep Cloud (semgrep.dev) detected. Rules from org policy, custom rules, dependency rules. Results will sync to security dashboard and GitHub Security tab.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'syft.*sbom|sbom.*generat| CycloneDX|SPEX|syft.*--') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] SBOM generation detected. Creating Software Bill of Materials. Format: CycloneDX or SPDX. SBOM used for vulnerability correlation and license compliance.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'falco|sysdig|twistlock|aqua|runtime.*security|container.*runtime') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Container runtime security scanner detected. Checking: syscalls, file access, network connections, privilege escalation, process execution, container drift detection.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'op.*amp|observability|Prometheus|Grafana|Jaeger|OpenTelemetry|OTEL|traces|metrics') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] Observability/telemetry tool detected. Check: (1) PII in logs/metrics, (2) sensitive data in traces, (3) unauthenticated endpoints, (4) metric leak via cardinality exploit.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastCommand -match 'API.*gateway|kong|apigee|tyk|AWS.*API.*Gateway|istio.*gateway|envoy.*gateway') { Write-Host '[SEC-REV PRE] API Gateway detected. Check: (1) WAF rules on gateway, (2) auth enforcement, (3) rate limiting, (4) request/response transformation security, (5) upstream trust, (6) API key management.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed }

if ($lastOutput -match '@WebFilter|@Component.*Filter|FilterChain|doFilter|OncePerRequestFilter|javax\.servlet\.Filter|Interceptor|HandlerInterceptor') { Write-Host '[FILTER] Java filter/interceptor chain found. Check: (1) filter order/priority, (2) filter bypass paths, (3) request wrapping/mutation, (4) response header modifications, (5) error handling in filter.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'HttpContext|Request\.User|ClaimsPrincipal|IPrincipal|User\.Identity|request\.user|req\.user|currentUser|getCurrentUser') { Write-Host '[AUTHZ] User identity context found. Verify: (1) identity is from server-side trusted source, (2) not spoofable via header injection, (3) roles/claims populated at authentication, (4) identity immutable after auth.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'Snowflake|BigQuery|Redshift|Databricks|Elastic|Solr|ClickHouse|Timescale|Cockroach|Spanner|Aurora|RDS|CloudSQL') { Write-Host '[DB] Managed database service detected. Check: (1) public accessibility, (2) IAM auth vs password auth, (3) encryption at rest, (4) audit logging enabled, (5) network isolation, (6) backup retention settings.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'AES|RSA|ECC|ECDSA|ed25519|curve25519|ChaCha20|Poly1305|GCM|CBC|ECB|CBC-MAC|HMAC|PBKDF2|bcrypt|scrypt|argon') { Write-Host '[CRYPTO CHECK] Cryptographic algorithm profile found. Verify: (1) modern algorithm selection (AES-GCM, RSA-2048+, ChaCha20-Poly1305), (2) IV/nonce unique per operation, (3) key length sufficient, (4) key derivation uses strong KDF.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'OAuth2|openid|connect|authorization_code|client_credentials|PKCE|S256|code_verifier|state.*param') { Write-Host '[OAUTH] OAuth2/OIDC flow found. Check: (1) PKCE enforced for public clients, (2) state parameter present/validated, (3) redirect_uri strict validation, (4) token binding (DPoP/mTLS), (5) scope minimalism.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

if ($lastOutput -match 'grpc|protobuf|proto|proto3|proto2|twirp|connect|Dubbo|Thrift|Avro|Parquet|ORC') { Write-Host '[RPC] RPC/serialization framework found. Check: (1) method-level authz (not just transport), (2) input validation on protobuf fields, (3) reflection endpoint exposed, (4) TLS enforcement, (5) message size limits.' -ForegroundColor Gray }

if ($lastOutput -match 'regex|RegExp|Pattern|Pattern\.compile|re\.compile|match\(|search\(|findall\(|grep') { Write-Host '[REGEX] Regular expression operation found. Check: (1) ReDoS risk (catastrophic backtracking), (2) user-controlled regex (ReDoS or bypass), (3) regex used for security decision (should not be sole gate), (4) unbounded input matched against regex.' -ForegroundColor Yellow }

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Attack surface summary format: each finding includes {title, severity, confidence, category, affected_component, attack_vector, prerequisites, user_interaction, scope_changed, cwe_id, owasp_category, remediation, effort, cvss_40_estimate}.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Trust boundary diagram format: Mermaid ERD showing: external (internet) -> WAF/CDN -> load balancer -> API gateway -> service mesh -> microservices -> databases/cache. Label each boundary crossing with auth mechanism and encryption status.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] Finding deduplication: before adding finding, check if (1) same CWE exists, (2) same affected component, (3) same attack vector. If match -> merge evidence, update severity if needed. False duplicates = separate by affected component or code path.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed

Write-Host '[SEC-REV CTX] SAST tool orchestration: run all tools in parallel: semgrep (linting), bandit/gosec (lang-specific), osv-scanner (deps), gitleaks (secrets), CodeQL (deep semantic). Combine results, deduplicate, prioritize. Manual review fills gaps.' -ForegroundColor DarkRed
